category_sources: Official homepage describes IPBT as a high-tech ttyrec player for Unix with random-access playback.
source_facts.description says it records a UNIX terminal session.
docs_sources: Official homepage links the online man page and describes introduction, technical details, status, download, and source checkout.
Official man page documents synopsis, description, options, playback controls, bugs, and licence.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage gives the development source checkout command git clone https://git.tartarus.org/simon/ipbt.git.
tags_sources: Official homepage and man page describe ttyrec playback, terminal emulation, curses, and random access.
source_facts.description identifies UNIX terminal session recording.
